intentSynonyms: get an user profile in linkedin
look up an user profile in linkedin
fetch a single user profile in linkedin
view one specific user profile in linkedin
get a user's linkedin profile in linkedin
description: Get a LinkedIn user profile by their public identifier (the slug from their profile URL, e.g., "williamhgates" for linkedin.com/in/williamhgates). Returns name, headline, location, and profile picture.

public_identifier.description: Public profile identifier — the slug from the LinkedIn profile URL (e.g., "williamhgates")
